description.value: Aura strong evocation; CL 13th; Slot none; Price 82,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This smooth staff carved from hickory or yew allows use of the following spells: Fireball (1 charge) Magic missile (1 charge) Shatter (1 charge) Ice storm (2 charges) Wall of force (2 charges) Chain lightning (3 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells chain lightning, fireball, ice storm, magic missile, shatter, wall of force; Cost 41,000 gp.
